column1: 交付证据不足时写入返工快照，买方资金、平台费和 Agent 收入继续冻结。

column1: 交付无法补正时，买方可基于验收或返工快照进入退款复核。
column2: If delivery cannot be corrected, the buyer can enter refund review from an acceptance or rework snapshot.

column1: 范围、权限或输出质量存在重大分歧时，提交仲裁员冻结复核。
column2: When scope, permissions, or output quality are materially disputed, submit to arbitrator frozen review.

column1: 买方资金继续冻结，等待返工
column2: Buyer funds remain frozen, waiting for rework

column1: 平台服务费继续预留，等待返工验收
column2: Platform fee remains reserved, waiting for rework acceptance

column1: Agent 收入暂停，等待返工补交
column2: Agent income is paused, waiting for rework resubmission

column1: 交付证据已锁定，当前页不释放托管

column1: 返工请求已写入，托管继续冻结

column1: 交付证据已锁定，托管结算已流转
column2: Delivery evidence is locked; escrow settlement has flowed

column1: 打开本页只审阅交付证据，不会释放托管；只有点击“确认验收并放款”才会写入放款账本。
column2: Opening this page only reviews delivery evidence and does not release escrow; only clicking "Confirm acceptance and release funds" writes release ledger entries.

column1: 买方必须基于证据选择下一步：通过验收、要求返工，或在形成快照后进入退款/争议分支。
column2: The buyer must choose the next step from evidence: accept, request rework, or enter refund/dispute after a snapshot exists.

column1: 已有结算分支，当前页只展示已提交申请和账本状态
column2: A settlement branch already exists; this page only shows the submitted application and ledger state

column1: 交付证据未达到验收标准，买方请求暂停结算并复核退款。
column2: Delivery evidence did not meet acceptance standards, so the buyer requests settlement pause and refund review.

column1: 买方质疑交付范围、权限或异常处理，需要仲裁员复核。
column2: The buyer disputes delivery scope, permissions, or exception handling and needs arbitrator review.

column1: 退款、补证后再验收，或按裁决调整平台服务费。
column2: Refund, re-accept after additional evidence, or adjust the platform fee by ruling.

column1: 由仲裁员裁定放款、退款、部分放款或返工。
column2: Arbitrator decides release, refund, partial release, or rework.

column1: 引用验收记录、交付哈希、执行日志和缺失证据清单。
column2: Reference acceptance record, delivery hash, execution logs, and missing-evidence checklist.

column1: 引用验收记录、范围说明、权限日志、输出哈希和异常清单。
column2: Reference acceptance record, scope notes, permission logs, output hash, and exception checklist.

column1: 提交前只生成申请预览，不创建案件、不冻结资金、不改写账本。

column1: 提交后平台进入退款复核，Agent 收入暂停结算。

column1: 申请已写入结算分支，当前页面展示可审计证据、账本影响和后续处理流程。
